markets.question: Spread: Iwaki FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming J2 100 Year Vision League game, scheduled for March 8 at 12:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Iwaki FC" if Iwaki FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Ventforet Kōfu".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on jleague.jp. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

In the upcoming J2 100 Year Vision League game between Iwaki FC and Ventforet Kōfu, scheduled for March 8 at 12:00 AM ET:

markets.question: Iwaki FC vs. Ventforet Kōfu: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming J2 100 Year Vision League game between Iwaki FC and Ventforet Kōfu, scheduled for March 8 at 12:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Iwaki FC and Ventforet Kōfu each score at least one goal during the game.
